data.name: Single-Cell Multi-Omics
data.description: Simultaneously measuring multiple molecular layers (genome, epigenome, transcriptome, proteome) in individual cells. Reveals cellular heterogeneity at unprecedented resolution.
data.application: Cancer heterogeneity, immune cell profiling, developmental biology, drug resistance
data.tool: 10x Genomics Multiome, Parse Biosciences, BD Rhapsody

data.name: Long-Read Sequencing (PacBio/Oxford Nanopore)
data.description: Reading DNA sequences >10,000 bases in a single read, resolving repetitive regions, structural variants, and epigenetic modifications that short-read sequencing misses.
data.application: Complete genome assembly, structural variant detection, direct RNA sequencing, methylation detection

data.name: AI-Driven Drug Discovery
data.description: Using machine learning to predict drug-target interactions, optimize lead compounds, and design novel molecules. Dramatically reduces drug development time and cost.
data.application: De novo drug design, virtual screening, ADMET prediction, clinical trial optimization
